## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated focused tests where practical.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible or maintainer-visible changes.
- [ ] Bumped `CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION` for app/runtime behavior changes.
- [ ] Checked that no SIP credentials, private keys, customer data, or sensitive traces are included.
- [ ] Updated README or related docs if setup, behavior, or distribution changed.

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out risky areas, follow-up work, or anything that needs particular attention.
